name: Awesome MCP Servers
what_it_does: A comprehensive curated list of MCP server implementations spanning 30+ categories including databases, cloud storage, communication platforms, finance, and development tools. This is a directory with multilingual support (EN/CN/JP/KR), not an MCP server itself.
use_cases: Discovering MCP servers across all domains and categories
Finding official vs community MCP implementations
Browsing the MCP ecosystem in multiple languages
not_for: Guaranteed quality assurance of listed servers
best_when: You want the broadest possible catalog of MCP servers across all categories, with multilingual access.
avoid_when: You need a runnable MCP server rather than a reference directory.

auth.notes: No auth required; static reference list.

pricing.notes: Open source curated list on GitHub. Includes downloadable Excel spreadsheet with ~6000 entries.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Not applicable; this is a curated list, not software.
known_agent_gotchas: This is a curated directory, not an MCP server
Includes security warnings about sandbox risks which is a good sign

security_score_components.security_notes: Curated MCP server list/directory. Community resource — vet each server individually. Quality varies widely. No centralized security review process.
